description: Sync contacts, companies, opportunities, and tasks from Copper CRM (formerly ProsperWorks), the CRM built for Google Workspace.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Found in Copper → System Settings → Integrations → API Keys

install_fields.label: User Email
install_fields.help: The email address of the Copper account holder associated with this API key

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync all resources: people, companies, opportunities, tasks.

apis.name: List People
apis.description: Return all people (contacts) as normalised dicts.

apis.name: List Companies
apis.description: Return all companies as normalised dicts.

apis.name: List Opportunities
apis.description: Return all opportunities as normalised dicts.

apis.name: List Tasks
apis.description: Return all tasks as normalised dicts.

apis.name: Get Person
apis.description: Fetch and normalise a single person by Copper ID.

name: CopperConnector
